title: Power BI Data Analyst Intern
description: PMO Intern  Data Specialist (Power BI & Data Warehouse)We are looking for a motivated PMO Intern  Data Specialist to support the Corporate Digital & IT Project Management Office. The intern will assist in designing and maintaining data warehouse solutions and developing Power BI dashboards that transform raw data into actionable insights.This role provides hands-on exposure to data analytics, business intelligence, and enterprise data management in a dynamic digital transformation environment.Ke
